jobs.title: AI-Built Dumpster Rental Website
jobs.description:
I have a logo, a company name, and a clear picture of how the site should feel—modern, professional, and big in scale—but everything else still needs to be created. The single most important task for the site is to let customers book a dumpster.

I’ll share reference websites that capture the layout, color palette, and flow I’m after. You’re free to lean on AI tools for hero images, videos, icons, and concise copy as long as the assets are fully licensed for commercial use.

The build should be mobile-first, load quickly, and include a straightforward admin area so my staff can adjust prices, availability windows, and FAQs without touching code. I ideally want the website to look as if we’re well established and large in scale, I want clients to know abo...

jobs.title: Service Business WordPress Site Build
jobs.description:
I’m ready to launch a clean, professional WordPress site that highlights my service-based business and converts visitors into enquiries.  

Core pages will showcase each service clearly, while a prominent, easy-to-use contact form should funnel prospects straight to my inbox. I’d like the layout to be mobile-responsive, fast, and simple for me to update later—Elementor, Gutenberg, or another modern page builder is fine as long as editing stays intuitive.

Here’s what I’m looking for you to deliver:  
• A fresh WordPress install on my hosting (or migration if you prefer to build off-site first).  
• Custom service-listing section with room for images, descriptions, and clear calls to action.  
• Branded contact form that triggers an email notific...

jobs.title: Casual Informative Website Copy
jobs.description:
I’m refreshing my website and need clear, easy-going copy that simply tells visitors who we are, what we do, and why they should stick around. The sole purpose is to provide information—no hard-selling tactics—so the wording should feel conversational yet still reflect our professionalism.

Here’s what I’m after:  

• Complete website copy, ready to paste into each page (Home, About, Services, and Contact are the core sections I have in mind).  
• A consistent, casual tone of voice throughout, free of jargon and heavy marketing language.  
• Naturally placed keywords that help with basic on-page SEO without sounding forced.  
• Brief calls to action that guide readers to learn more or get in touch rather than “buy now.”

jobs.title: House of Stars Luxury wine label all colors and layers included
jobs.description:
I need a wine label that includes everything listed below that looks something similar to the picture of the label i included without the brooke (Star) autograph.



1. High-resolution Adobe Illustrator file (.AI)





This means the original working design file, not a picture of the label.



What they do not want:



JPG
PNG
PDF export
Screenshot
Canva file
Photoshop flattened image




What they do want:



The actual Illustrator file (.AI) the artwork was built in.




Why:

Printers need the layers, vectors, and text so they can prepare plates for printing.



Simple way to say it to him:



The winery needs the original Illustrator working file (.AI), not an exported image or PDF.









2. Size guidance – 4 inches wide by 5 inches high

jobs.title: Virtual Administration Officer for Expanding Business
jobs.description:
Our business is expanding quickly and I need an organised virtual administration officer who can slot into our existing systems three days each week—Monday, Wednesday and Friday. Your core focus will be keeping the daily back-office workflow smooth so the rest of the team can stay client-facing.

You will jump straight into our shared inbox to triage and answer enquiries, prepare quotes, raise invoices and follow up outstanding payments. Because we run our books through QuickBooks, prior experience there is important—you should already be comfortable coding expenses, reconciling bank feeds and processing a straightforward payroll. Everything specific to our operation, from file naming conventions to customer tone of voice, will be covered during onboarding.

I value clear, frie...

jobs.title: Flutter Developer Needed to Build Live Streaming & Video Calling App Similar to Tango
jobs.description:
We are looking for an experienced Flutter developer with backend expertise to develop a live streaming and video calling mobile application similar to Tango or Bigo Live.

The app will allow users to connect with nearby users, make live video calls, send virtual gifts, and interact through live streaming features.

The developer should be able to handle both frontend (Flutter) and backend integration (Node.js / Firebase / WebRTC / Streaming SDK).

⸻

Key Responsibilities
	•	Develop a Flutter-based Android application
	•	Implement live video streaming and 1-to-1 video calling
	•	Integrate real-time chat and messaging
	•	Implement user login/signup (Google, OTP, etc.)
	•	Add nearby users feature using location
	•	Implement virtual coins & in-app purchase sys...

jobs.title: Bi-Weekly Apartment Tidy/Clean Needed
jobs.description:
I need someone to clean my apartment :) I’d like it done every two weeks if possible

I’m a business owner who works away from home and it’s just me that lives here. So it’s tidying. dishes. The bad stuff in the fridge goes in the trash. I have two cats so their 2 water bowls get cleaned and refilled. They have a self cleaning litter box. Any clothes that are out get hung up. A vacuum. 2 hours tops.

jobs.title: Dragon Ball-Style UE5 VFX
jobs.description:
I’m developing a Dragon Ball Z–inspired project in Unreal Engine 5 and need a skilled VFX artist to bring three core elements to life:

• Stylized energy blasts that echo the series’ iconic beam clashes and rapid-fire projectiles.  
• A vivid transformation sequence focused on a powerful ki-charge state (no hair or model changes, just the aura and surge).  
• Dynamic background effects—dust, debris, distant shockwaves—that make the battlefield feel alive without overwhelming gameplay performance.

Please build everything natively in UE5 using Niagara and custom materials so I can drop the systems straight into my project. Each effect should be GPU-friendly, parameterized for easy color and scale tweaks, and packaged with any textures, emitters, ...

jobs.title: Pie charts and cool graphs
jobs.description:
Simple job really. I need someone to create pie charts and cool looking graphs from very basic spreadsheets so I can include them in a PowerPoint presentation I’m making. 
For example- I have a list of top 10 Customers. I want a pie chart or graph ( or possibly both) to show how much material we sold and the sales in dollars. Pretty basic but I just don’t have the time to do it myself. Probably no more than 10 simple charts needed. On the chart it would probably need two axes (using the example, one axis would have sales in $, the second axis would have volume of material in tons)
Output needed by 16:00 GMT on Friday 6 March.
